overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, stormy forest at night during heavy rainfall. The character navigates a narrow dirt path surrounded by dense pine trees and undergrowth, with visibility limited by rain and darkness, before turning left to venture deeper into the woods.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with narrow dirt path

events.description: character begins turning left to change direction away from the main path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest dirt path through heavy rain, with sword visible on back

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail through the forest with visible rain splashes
tall evergreen trees forming dense forest walls on both sides
tall evergreen trees forming dense forest walls on both sides
dark storm clouds visible through gaps in the tree canopy
green grass and undergrowth lining the sides of the path
green grass and undergrowth lining the sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rain-soaked forest path at night. The character walks steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail flanked by dense pine trees and lush green undergrowth. Heavy rain falls continuously, creating a hazy atmosphere with limited visibility. The stormy sky is partially visible through the canopy above.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest interior with grassy floor and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the forest undergrowth after turning left from the main path, navigating between trees

entered.detail: grassy terrain with patches of dirt replacing the defined path
dense shrubs and underbrush filling the forest floor
large rocks covered in moss scattered throughout the forest

segments.scene_description: After turning left from the main trail, the character moves deeper into the forest where the ground becomes grassy and less defined. The trees feel closer and more immersive, with mossy rocks and dense underbrush filling the scene. The heavy rain continues to fall, and the forest canopy blocks most of the sky, creating an enclosed, atmospheric environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-drenched forest that shifts from a defined dirt path into the dense, enclosed depths of the woods. It begins with the character walking steadily along a narrow trail flanked by towering pine trees and lush undergrowth under a stormy, hazy sky. As the character turns left, the scene transitions away from the established path toward a more wild, grassy terrain. The environment then becomes increasingly immersive as the forest canopy closes in, replacing the open trail with mossy rocks and thick underbrush. Finally, the heavy rainfall persists, enveloping the character in a dark, atmospheric wilderness where the sky is almost entirely obscured.
